versions.version_description: Simplified and more easy to read for piano players.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
12/8

[Intro]

[ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Db7[/ch]   [ch]C7[/ch]
[ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Db7[/ch]   [ch]C7[/ch]
[ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Db7[/ch]   [ch]C7[/ch]
[ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]Db11[/ch] [ch]Eb11[/ch] [ch]F11[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch] 
   Girl I'm in love with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb13[/ch]              [ch]D7#5[/ch]
   This ain't the honeymoon[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                   [ch]C7[/ch]          [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]Db11[/ch] [ch]Eb11[/ch] [ch]F11[/ch]   
   We're passed the infatuation phase[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                   [ch]C7[/ch]
   We're right in the thick of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb13[/ch]               [ch]D7#5[/ch]
   At times we get sick of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]C7[/ch]              [ch]Eb/F[/ch]
   It seems like we argue every day[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]C7[/ch]
I know I misbehaved[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb13[/ch]         [ch]D7#5[/ch]
And you made your mistakes[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
And we both still got room left to grow[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]
And though love sometimes hurts[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb13[/ch]         [ch]D7#5[/ch]
I still put you first[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]F/A[/ch]
And we'll make this thing work[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]        
But I think we should take it slow[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]F/A[/ch]
    We're just ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb/G[/ch]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  
   We don't know which way to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]F/A[/ch]  
   'Cause we're ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
   Maybe we should take it slow[/tab]

Lick sulla 2ª croma dell'ultima terzina F-F#-G
Pausa di minima sul battere del 2º verse

[Verse 2]

This ain't a movie no
[tab]  [ch]Eb13[/ch]           [ch]D7#5[/ch]
No fairy tale conclusion ya'll[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]           [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   [ch]Db11[/ch] [ch]Eb11[/ch] [ch]F11[/ch]
It gets more confusing everyday, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]
   Sometimes it's heaven sent[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb13[/ch]          [ch]D7#5[/ch]
Then we head back to hell again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]C7[/ch]             [ch]Eb/F[/ch]
We kiss, then we make up on the way[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]         [ch]C7[/ch]
I hang up you call[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb13[/ch]        [ch]D7#5[/ch]
We rise and we fall[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]       [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
And we feel like just walking away[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]C7[/ch]
As our love advances[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb13[/ch]         [ch]D7#5[/ch]
We take second chances[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]F/A[/ch]
Though it's not a fantasy[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]      
I still want you to stay[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]F/A[/ch]
    We're just ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb/G[/ch]                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  
    We don't know which way to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]F/A[/ch]  
   'Cause we're ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
    Maybe we should take it slow[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
  Maybe we'll live and learn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb13[/ch]                     
  Maybe we'll crash and burn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            
  Maybe you'll stay[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Maybe you'll leave[/tab]
Maybe you'll return
[tab][ch]Dbadd9/F[/ch] 
   Maybe another fight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebadd9/G[/ch]
   Maybe we won't survive[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
   But maybe we'll grow[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Eb7b9[/ch]
We never know, baby you and I[/tab]

[Guitar Solo]

[ch]Abm7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]
[ch]Abm7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]
[ch]Abm7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]
[ch]Abm7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]
[ch]Abm7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]
[ch]Abm7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]
[ch]Abm7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]Db7[/ch]
[ch]Abm7[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]

[Modulated Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]
    We're just ordinary people[/tab]
E/G#                          Gbmaj7    (Lick on)  
   We don't know which way to go
[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]  
   'Cause we're ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]                      [ch]B/C#[/ch]
   Maybe we should take it slow[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]
    We're just ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]                          [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Abm7[/ch]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch] 
   We don't know which way to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]  
   'Cause we're ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]                      [ch]B/C#[/ch]
   Maybe we should take it slow[/tab]


[Outro]

Only Piano&Vox

[tab]        [ch]Bmaj7[/ch] [ch]B6[/ch] [ch]B9[/ch] [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Take it slow, oh-oh oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]D9[/ch]              [ch]B6/Db[/ch]   [ch]Ebm7/Db[/ch] [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
This time we'll take    it      slow[/tab]
